summary: 17 active signals, 49 disabled. System is in ranging regime. Key finding: several enabled signals have collapsed recently (econ_calendar 33% recent, crypto_macro 22.9% recent, credit_spread_risk 20% recent, ministral 30% recent). The accuracy gate, regime gating, and per-ticker blacklists provide defense-in-depth but the number of degraded enabled signals is high. crypto_evrp (66-73% recent) remains the best disabled signal and should be enabled. BUY accuracy is systematically worse than SELL accuracy across nearly all signals — the system has a SELL edge and a BUY deficit.

top_signals.note: STILL DISABLED despite being the #1 recent performer for 2 consecutive audits. Anti-correlated with the failing macro cluster. 85.7% BUY accuracy (42 sam), 61.6% SELL accuracy (185 sam). Should be P0 enabled.
Consistent star. 58.5% BUY, 53.7% SELL at 1d. Recent 66.7% at 775 samples confirms it is not a small-sample illusion. SELL recent is 77.2% (534 sam) — very strong.
70.0% at 3h_recent on 1762 samples. SELL-only signal (99.2% SELL direction). 63.6% at 1d_recent (280 sam). Horizon multiplier 1.4x at 3h is well-justified.
All-time 52.3% but recent 63.1%. SELL recent is 80.2% (252 sam). BUY recent only 41.8% (201 sam) — directional gate should catch this. Massive 33K sample base makes all-time reliable.
Consistent performer. SELL recent 79.4% (160 sam), BUY recent 39.7% (229 sam). Unclustered (full 1.0x weight) — justified by 54.5% all-time on 8.7K samples.

ZERO recent samples for 2nd consecutive audit. Strong all-time 58.6% but only fires at extreme F&G levels. BUY-only (100% BUY direction). In ranging regime it is regime-gated (0.3x weight). No actionable data this week.

All-time strong at 60.0%, SELL accuracy 73.6% (2542 sam). Recent degradation to 50% on only 42 samples — too small to be conclusive. BUY all-time only 33.2% (1291 sam) — directional gate should be blocking BUY votes.

Metals accuracy: BTC 60.9% 1h (1723 sam), ETH 55.9% (2538 sam). But XAG 28.4% 1h (116 sam), XAG 23.1% 3h (78 sam). Per-ticker blacklist correctly blocks on XAG/XAU. Recent 1d only 30% on 40 samples. BUY recent: 6.7% (30 sam) — catastrophic BUY direction.

worst_signals.note: COLLAPSED from 50.0% all-time to 20.0% recent on 220 samples. 100% BUY direction (perma-bull). Per-ticker blacklists cover XAG, XAU, MSTR. In fundamental_cluster with crypto_macro. The accuracy gate (47%) should be catching this at consensus time. Verify gate is working.

COLLAPSED from 54.5% all-time to 22.9% recent on 340 samples (large enough to be real). 93.8% BUY direction — extreme bias (0.2x penalty applies). Blended accuracy ~32% should be caught by 47% gate. Per-ticker blacklisted on BTC/ETH at 1d.

COLLAPSED from 57.6% all-time to 33.0% recent on 1024 samples — this is NOT noise. BUY recent only 26.3% (798 sam). Per-ticker blacklisted on BTC/ETH/XAG at 1d. Still 59.9% at 3h all-time but 0 recent 3h samples. The 3h accuracy may also be stale.

Recent 30% but only 40 samples — borderline statistical significance. BUY recent: 6.7% (30 sam) — directional gate should block BUY. SELL recent: 100% (10 sam) but tiny sample. Per-ticker blacklisted on XAG/XAU. Watch for continued degradation.

All-time 49.4% is below coin-flip on 89 samples. Recent improved to 62.3% on 61 samples but is regime-gated in ranging (where we are now). BUY all-time only 35.8% (67 sam). Insufficient data to declare dead or alive.
Consistently terrible at 18-21%. 100% BUY direction. Already disabled. Never re-enable.

Recent 46.1% on 791 samples is below 47% gate threshold. BUY recent: 22.7% (374 sam) — catastrophic. SELL recent: 67.2% (417 sam) — decent. Per-ticker blacklisted at 1d for all tickers. But 60.1% at 3h_recent (1114 sam) — horizon-specific performance. The 1d horizon weight should be reduced.
All-time 52.5% is decent. Recent 51.1% is weaker. BUY recent: 33.0% (433 sam) — failing hard. SELL recent: 73.2% (354 sam) — strong. Same BUY-degradation pattern as everything else.

insufficient_data_signals.note: 80% on 10 samples is meaningless. Need 100+ to validate. Recent: 5 samples at 60%.
60% on 45 samples. BUY-only. Approaching minimum threshold.
69% on 42 samples is promising but insufficient. Recent 67.6% on 34. Candidate for enabling after 100 samples.
Approaching useful sample size at 518. 54.6% is above gate. But per-ticker blacklisted on XAG/XAU.
89 samples at 49.4% all-time. Improving recently (62.3% on 61 sam) but not enough data.

correlation_clusters.name: mean_reversion_cluster (ACTIVE)
correlation_clusters.note: RSI (63.1% recent), BB (56.0% recent), and mean_reversion (51.1% recent) are in momentum_cluster. All three have the same BUY-fail/SELL-strong asymmetry. Leader selection should prefer BB (unclustered at full 1.0x weight) or RSI. mean_reversion adds no information.

correlation_clusters.name: macro_external_cluster (ACTIVE)
correlation_clusters.note: 6-member cluster with 0.15x follower penalty. Leader is news_event (70.0% 3h recent) which is correct. econ_calendar and sentiment are regime-gated in ranging. fear_greed has 0 recent samples. funding has 0 recent samples. Effective cluster is just news_event + econ_calendar in practice.

correlation_clusters.name: fundamental_cluster (ACTIVE)
correlation_clusters.note: PROBLEM CLUSTER. All three are degraded: claude_fundamental (57.9% all-time but disabled), crypto_macro (22.9% recent), credit_spread_risk (20% recent). Both enabled members are below 47% gate. If the accuracy gate is working, this cluster contributes zero votes. Verify.

correlation_clusters.name: trend_mega meta-cluster (MOSTLY DISABLED)
correlation_clusters.note: Most members are disabled. Active: momentum_factors (enabled), ema/heikin_ashi/oscillators/volume_flow/macro_regime/structure (all disabled). In practice only oscillator_trend has an active leader (momentum_factors). The meta-cluster penalty rarely fires because leaders don't agree when most are HOLD.

correlation_clusters.name: anti_correlated: crypto_evrp vs macro cluster
correlation_clusters.note: crypto_evrp is the INVERSE of the failing macro cluster. While crypto_macro votes BUY at 22.9% accuracy, crypto_evrp has 85.7% BUY accuracy and 61.6% SELL accuracy. Enabling crypto_evrp would add genuine information diversity.

best_signals.note: Jump detection works well in range-bound markets
But BUY side only 41.8% — SELL dominates

worst_signals.note: Trend signal is noise in ranging. Regime-gated at 3h/4h, per-ticker blacklisted at 1d
Macro timing fails in ranging. Regime-gated
Cross-asset risk signal is broken in current regime
DeFi/staking metrics are noise in ranging crypto

ranging.note: 14 signals are regime-gated in ranging at _default horizon. Additional 7 gated at 3h/4h. The system correctly suppresses trend-following noise. The surviving voters (bb, rsi, statistical_jump_regime, news_event) are the high-accuracy ones.

trending.note: Not active today. Regime weights correctly boost trend-following and penalize mean-reversion.

weight_accuracy_mismatch.recommendation: Add 0.7x 1d horizon weight to match 3h's 1.2x. Signal has strong horizon divergence.
weight_accuracy_mismatch.note: Per-ticker blacklisted at 1d for ALL tickers already handles this. The 1.0x base weight should be reduced for the rare case it passes all gates at 1d.

weight_accuracy_mismatch.recommendation: REMOVE the 1.1x 1d horizon boost immediately. Signal is at 20% recent and getting a BOOST.
weight_accuracy_mismatch.note: CRITICAL MISMATCH. The 1d boost was set when accuracy was 56.4%. It has collapsed to 20%. The accuracy gate should catch it (20% << 47%) but the boost makes it worse if any gate relaxation occurs.

weight_accuracy_mismatch.recommendation: Adequate protection via per-ticker blacklists. No weight change needed.
weight_accuracy_mismatch.note: Defense-in-depth is working: per-ticker blacklist at 1d for BTC/ETH/XAG, regime-gated in ranging.

weight_accuracy_mismatch.recommendation: 0.3x ranging penalty is too generous for a signal with zero recent data. Consider HOLD-gating in ranging.
weight_accuracy_mismatch.note: BUY-only (100% direction). In ranging, BUY-only signals are actively harmful. Already regime-gated at 3h/4h but still active at _default.

weight_accuracy_mismatch.recommendation: BUY direction should be permanently gated (33.2% on 1291 samples). The 40% directional gate should already catch this. Verify.
weight_accuracy_mismatch.note: SELL is excellent (73.6% on 2542 sam). BUY is catastrophic (33.2% on 1291 sam). Directional rescue should allow SELL while blocking BUY.

overtrigger_analysis.analysis: 20 Layer 2 invocations producing mostly HOLD indicates overtriggering. In a ranging regime where most signals are gated or degraded, the trigger threshold should be higher. Each Layer 2 invocation costs 180-900s of Claude CLI time. With 17 active signals but ~8-10 regime-gated in ranging, the effective voter count drops to 7-9. Consensus among 7-9 voters oscillates more easily than among 17, causing frequent trigger crossings that resolve to HOLD after Layer 2 analysis.
overtrigger_analysis.root_cause: Trigger detection threshold is calibrated for full voter count (17). In ranging regime, effective voter count is ~8, making consensus more volatile. Small voter count + directional asymmetry (SELL > BUY accuracy) = frequent BUY→SELL flips.
overtrigger_analysis.recommendation: Consider regime-adaptive trigger thresholds: require higher confidence delta to trigger Layer 2 when in ranging regime. E.g., 70% confidence threshold in ranging vs 60% in trending.

likely_causes: XAG has the fewest effective voters after per-ticker blacklists (ministral, credit_spread_risk, metals_cross_asset, smart_money, structure, ema, sentiment all blacklisted = 7 signals blocked)

Remaining voters: rsi, bb, momentum, mean_reversion, momentum_factors, news_event, econ_calendar, statistical_jump_regime, qwen3, cot_positioning (~10 signals). Of these, momentum_factors is regime-gated in ranging, econ_calendar is per-ticker blacklisted at 1d for XAG
Effective XAG voters at 1d in ranging: ~6-7. A single flip from rsi or bb (the cluster leaders) flips the entire consensus
With persistence filter at 1 cycle for metals (relaxed from 2), single-cycle flips pass through immediately
xag_flipflop_analysis.recommendation: Consider raising metals persistence to 2 cycles. The 2026-05-11 relaxation to 1 cycle was premature — it trades flip-flop noise for responsiveness, but XAG's low voter count amplifies the noise.

btc_12h_phantom_buy.observation: BTC 12h phantom BUY appears repeatedly, always fades
btc_12h_phantom_buy.analysis: The 12h horizon has no specific gating in REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS (falls through to _default). In ranging, _default gates 15+ signals including btc_proxy. The surviving 12h voters are the momentum_cluster (rsi, mean_reversion, momentum) + fear_greed + qwen3. All have BUY accuracy < 42% recently. The 'phantom BUY' is likely these mean-reversion signals detecting oversold conditions (which is their job) but the signal is noise in ranging.
btc_12h_phantom_buy.specific_signal_likely: mean_reversion (BUY accuracy 58.9% all-time but 33.0% recent) or rsi (BUY accuracy 41.8% recent). Both are mean-reversion signals that fire BUY at dips. In ranging, these dips don't follow through.
btc_12h_phantom_buy.recommendation: Already partially addressed by regime gating. The 12h horizon has no specific override — consider adding 12h to regime-gated in ranging if the phantom persists.

systemic_buy_accuracy_deficit.observation: Nearly ALL signals have catastrophically worse BUY accuracy than SELL accuracy in recent data
systemic_buy_accuracy_deficit.interpretation: This is a MARKET REGIME signal, not a signal-engine bug. The market has been in a sustained downtrend or topping pattern where dip-buying fails consistently. The directional accuracy gate (40% threshold) should be blocking BUY votes for the worst offenders (momentum_factors BUY 22.7%, qwen3 BUY 16.7%, crypto_macro BUY 17.9%). Verify the directional gate is catching these.
systemic_buy_accuracy_deficit.recommendation: The system's SELL signals are highly accurate (70-80% for several). The BUY signals are noise. In ranging markets with BUY-deficit, the correct system behavior is to bias toward SELL and HOLD. The directional gate and bias penalty infrastructure handles this automatically, but verify with a manual check.

recommendations.title: Enable crypto_evrp (P0)
recommendations.description: crypto_evrp has 66.1% all-time (227 sam), 72.6% recent (157 sam) at 1d. Anti-correlated with the failing crypto_macro/credit_spread cluster. BUY accuracy 85.7% (42 sam), SELL 61.6% (185 sam). This is the single highest-impact change available — it adds a genuinely diverse, accurate signal to the crypto voter pool.
recommendations.expected_impact: +2-3pp crypto consensus accuracy by replacing the failing macro trio's influence with a genuinely predictive signal.

recommendations.title: Remove credit_spread_risk 1d horizon boost (P0)
recommendations.description: HORIZON_SIGNAL_WEIGHTS['1d']['credit_spread_risk'] = 1.1 was set when the signal had 56.4% accuracy. It is now at 20% recent. The accuracy gate should block it, but the boost creates a contradiction: the system simultaneously boosts and gates the same signal. Remove the 1.1x boost or set it to 0.5x.
recommendations.expected_impact: Minimal direct impact (gate already blocks), but eliminates a logic contradiction and prevents damage if gate relaxation fires.

recommendations.title: Verify directional gate is blocking catastrophic BUY votes (P0)
recommendations.description: Multiple signals have BUY accuracy below 25% recently: momentum_factors (22.7%), qwen3 (16.7%), crypto_macro (17.9%), econ_calendar (26.3%). The directional gate threshold is 40%. Verify in signal_log that these BUY votes are being converted to HOLD at consensus time.
recommendations.expected_impact: Diagnostic. If gate is working, no change needed. If not, fixing it could add +3-5pp to consensus accuracy.

recommendations.title: Consider raising metals persistence filter to 2 cycles (P1)
recommendations.description: XAG-USD has ~6-7 effective voters after regime gating and per-ticker blacklists. The persistence relaxation to 1 cycle (2026-05-11) allows single-cycle flips to enter consensus. With such a small voter pool, this creates BUY→SELL flip-flops. Raising to 2 cycles for metals would smooth consensus at the cost of 60s latency.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduce XAG flip-flop frequency by ~50%. May miss 1-in-10 fast reversals but current flip-flop noise is worse.

recommendations.title: Regime-adaptive trigger thresholds (P2)
recommendations.description: 20 mostly-HOLD Layer 2 invocations in ranging regime wastes Claude CLI time. When the system detects ranging regime, raise the trigger confidence threshold from 60% to 70%. This would prevent borderline triggers from invoking Layer 2 when the voter pool is depleted and consensus is unstable.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduce Layer 2 invocations by 40-60% in ranging regime without missing genuinely strong signals.

recommendations.title: Add 12h regime gating for mean-reversion in ranging (P2)
recommendations.description: The BTC 12h phantom BUY is likely from mean_reversion or rsi detecting false oversold conditions in ranging. These signals have 33-42% BUY accuracy recently. Adding a 12h key to REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS['ranging'] with mean_reversion would suppress the phantom without affecting the 3h horizon where mean_reversion still has value.
recommendations.expected_impact: Eliminate the documented BTC 12h phantom BUY pattern.

recommendations.title: Shadow-track momentum as mean_reversion replacement candidate (P3)
recommendations.description: mean_reversion (52.5% 1d, 51.1% recent) is in momentum_cluster but adds zero information over RSI and BB which are more accurate. If mean_reversion degrades further below 50%, consider disabling it and promoting momentum (53.0% 1d) as the sole momentum_cluster member alongside RSI.
recommendations.expected_impact: Simplification. Removing a redundant voter improves signal-to-noise ratio.
